title: Generator Installation and Repair
desc: We provide professional generator installation and repair services for homes and businesses across the GTA. Whether you need a new standby generator installed or your existing unit serviced, our team ensures reliable backup power when you need it most. We handle diagnostics, repairs, maintenance, and full installations with safe, code-compliant workmanship and fast response times.
body:
## Generator Installation & Repair ⚡

At QuickFast, we specialize in generator installation and repair services for homeowners across the Greater Toronto Area.

​

From professional installations to expert diagnostics and repairs, our experienced technicians ensure your backup power system runs reliably—so you’re prepared when it matters most.

[REQUEST A QUOTE](https://www.quickfast.ca/contact-us)

![Happy Family at Home](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_e1633451520b4439a0b63706f829e8a1~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_721,h_383,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/11062b_e1633451520b4439a0b63706f829e8a1~mv2.jpg)

![generac-14KW-backup-generator-installed-almonte-on.jpeg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/824e75_dea71de1983f4d82bbf4ce4fb05ac07e~mv2.jpeg/v1/fill/w_560,h_434,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/generac-14KW-backup-generator-installed-almonte-on.jpeg)

Your Generac Generator Experts ⚡​

Power outages can happen at any time—and they’re becoming more common across the GTA.

A standby generator gives you reliable peace of mind with automatic backup power when you need it most. Unlike portable units, standby generators are permanently installed and connected directly to your home’s electrical panel and fuel source, allowing for seamless power restoration within seconds of an outage.

![home generator.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/824e75_6d95a8a6d54c493791ef9b941ec2bac8~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_721,h_663,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/824e75_6d95a8a6d54c493791ef9b941ec2bac8~mv2.jpg)

## Our Home Generator Services

Standby Generator Installation

Our comprehensive installation process begins with a free on-site assessment by one of our project managers.

​

During this visit, we evaluate your home’s power requirements to properly size the generator for your needs. Every home is different, and selecting the right capacity ensures your essential systems remain operational during an outage.

​

Once the ideal system is selected, we manage the entire installation from start to finish, including professional electrical connections and full system testing.

​

Our certified technicians ensure seamless integration with your home’s electrical system and fuel source, whether natural gas or propane. We also handle all required permits and compliance, including ESA approvals, gas permits, municipal by-laws, proper exhaust clearances, and sound requirements.

[BOOK AN APPOINTMENT](https://www.quickfast.ca/contact-us)

## Why Backup Power Matters in GTA

![BACKUP GENERATOR outside house.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/824e75_96e67370a93d422099cb9bd435e49855~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_391,h_391,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/BACKUP%20GENERATOR%20outside%20house.jpg)

![house with generator.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/824e75_b007883bd90b4c4eb5b705ee8b94c85d~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_391,h_391,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/house%20with%20generator.jpg)

Why Backup Power Matters in Toronto

​

Power outages are becoming more frequent across the Greater Toronto Area, affecting thousands of homes each year.

Studies suggest that Toronto’s power grid faces increasing strain from extreme weather, leading to outages that can last for hours—or even days. This makes reliable backup power more important than ever for homeowners.

​

A standby generator from QuickFast helps keep your home safe, comfortable, and fully powered during outages. It ensures your heating in winter, cooling in summer, lighting, and essential systems like security and appliances continue to operate without interruption.

​

For homes that rely on well water, backup power is critical. Without electricity, well pumps cannot supply water to your home.

​

Food safety is another major concern. The City of Toronto recommends discarding perishable food after four hours without power, which can lead to significant loss during extended outages.

​

Investing in a standby generator helps protect your home, your comfort, and your peace of mind.
